workflow_runs.title: Implement issue 9 skills-first slash workflow surface
workflow_runs.next_action: Ask what the first implementation slice should enforce after grilling completes.
workflow_runs.decision: Everything Claude Code/ECC is the repo-wide operating model for agentic workflows. Enforce the router contract across skill instructions, scripts, tests, docs, tracker/checkpoint artifacts, context manifests, scaffold templates, and future UI/status surfaces. Do not rely on Codex's generic assumptions about fast-changing agentic workflows.
